data.title: Imagine Devices Inc. partners with Neotech Products to enhance neonatal care on Jan 23, 2026.
data.description: In Valencia, California and Austin, Texas, on January 23, 2026, Imagine Devices Inc. revealed a significant collaboration with Neotech Products. Imagine Devices, a company specializing in medical devices for neonatal and pediatric critical care, joined forces with Neotech Products, a prominent player in neonatal and pediatric medical industries. This partnership aims to leverage the strengths of both companies to enhance care for newborns and children.

data.title: Winter storm hitting US, 160M people affected; travelers advised on insurance amid disruptions.
data.description: In St. Petersburg, Florida, on January 23, 2026, it has been reported that over 160 million individuals are preparing for the arrival of the most severe winter storm so far this season. The storm is anticipated to bring freezing rain, significant snowfall, and temperatures dropping below zero. Various major cities and airports are likely to experience disruptions due to the extreme weather conditions. Travelers are advised to...

data.title: Stellar (XLM) advocates for blockchain-TradFi integration at Davos 2026, highlighting protocols for accountability, privacy, and compliance.
data.description: Stellar (XLM) has discussed the potential for code-based blockchain protocols to provide essential features like accountability, privacy, and compliance that are necessary for traditional payment networks. This highlights the importance of embracing new technologies to enhance the functionality and security of financial transactions.

data.title: Dow drops 350 points; Applied Digital jumps on AI factory news. The article covers live updates.
data.description: On Friday, the Dow Jones index experienced a significant drop of 350 points. Applied Digital saw a remarkable surge following news about an AI factory, while another stock witnessed a rocket-like rise. The market update featured a live coverage discussing the sharp decline in the Dow Jones index and the impressive performance of Applied Digital due to the mystery factory news.

data.title: Citigroup plans more layoffs in March, targets senior roles after 1,000 cuts this month. Aims to cut 20,000 roles by 2026.
data.description: Citigroup Inc. is gearing up for more employee layoffs in March after around 1,000 job cuts recently. The upcoming layoffs will mainly impact managing directors and senior staff in various business areas as the bank aims to streamline operations as part of a larger restructuring initiative. This is in line with the bank's plan announced two years ago to cut 20,000 jobs by 2026. Currently, Citigroup has approximately 227,000 employees.

data.title: Silver's recent surge reflects investors rotating from gold, both hitting new highs, reminiscent of past altcoin seasons.
data.description: As gold and silver hit new highs, investors are shifting towards silver from gold, resembling past altcoin surges.

data.title: Paradex returns $650K to 200 customers due to bug leading to liquidations across several markets from database glitch.
data.description: During a recent database upgrade, Paradex experienced a temporary corruption of funding data which led to unintended liquidations across various markets. To rectify this issue, a chain rollback was initiated, and refunds are being processed. The exact number of affected markets and customers has not been disclosed.

data.title: KENT® Nutrition's ARGIS® probiotic showcased at IPPE 2026 in Georgia with Booth BC36119. Leader in animal nutrition innovation.
data.description: A company specializing in animal nutrition, KENT® Nutrition, revealed that their revolutionary probiotic, ARGIS®, is being highlighted in the New Product Showcase at the International Production & Processing Expo (IPPE) 2026. Attendees of the expo can gain insights into ARGIS at the New Product Showcase within the Discovery Zone at Booth BC36119 in the Georgia World Congress Center situated in Atlanta, GA. The IPPE New Product Showcase acknowledges distinguished exhibitors who showcase innovative products.

data.title: IntelliGRC achieves FedRAMP Moderate readiness, enhancing cybersecurity posture; increasing customer data protection confidence.
data.description: IntelliGRC has reached a significant achievement that enhances its cybersecurity defense, giving a boost of assurance to both the Defense Industrial Base and all of its customers. This milestone, announced in Fairfax, Virginia on January 23, 2026 through a PRNewswire release, highlights the platform's strengthened capability to safeguard customer data. This development solidifies IntelliGRC's status as a reliable player in the cybersecurity domain, underscoring the growing importance of data protection in today's digital landscape.

data.title: University of Phoenix released Healthcare Programs Guide consolidating program details, alumni stories, and cost-saving opportunities - Jan. 23, 2026.
data.description: Phoenix, on January 23, 2026, University of Phoenix unveiled its latest Healthcare Programs Guide, consolidating program specifics, alumni narratives, and cost-cutting prospects into a single user-friendly platform. This resource serves as a comprehensive source for individuals interested in exploring various healthcare programs and learning about potential savings.

data.title: Ultragenyx Stock (Nasdaq: RARE) drops after failing to meet primary endpoints in Phase III studies on setrusumab.
data.description: An investigation is being conducted by Levi & Korsinsky, LLP into Ultragenyx Pharmaceutical Inc. (Nasdaq: RARE) in response to the Company's release of topline data from its Phase III Orbit and Cosmic Studies. The studies assessed the efficacy of setrusumab (UX143) in a specific medical context.

data.title: Painting expert advises Johns Creek, GA HOAs on maintaining properties without constant repainting.
data.description: In Johns Creek, Georgia, as of January 23, 2026, property managers and homeowner associations are seeking ways to preserve their buildings' aesthetics without frequent painting. An article on HelloNation discusses this issue, featuring insights from Chris Curtis.

data.title: nVent Electric plc (NYSE: NVT) to report Q4 2025 financial results on Feb 6, 2026. Key player in electrical solutions.
data.description: On January 23, 2026, nVent Electric plc (NYSE: NVT), a prominent company specializing in electrical connection and protection solutions worldwide, announced that it is scheduled to disclose its financial performance for the fourth quarter of 2025 on Friday, February 6, 2026.
